title: Flea Treatment in Longwood, Bronx | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Longwood, Bronx. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Longwood home? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services throughout Longwood and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: We've been serving Longwood residents for years with same-day and next-day service options tailored to the unique housing landscape of this vibrant Bronx community. Our licensed exterminators understand the specific flea challenges faced by Longwood's mix of apartment buildings, row houses, and multi-family homes, delivering treatments that work the first time.
localContext: Longwood's dense residential areas, including the many apartment complexes along Longwood Avenue and Southern Boulevard, can be particularly susceptible to flea problems, especially in buildings with multiple pet-owning families. Our team is familiar with treating homes near local landmarks like St. Ignatius School and Longwood Park, ensuring discreet and effective service for this close-knit community.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Longwood?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Longwood typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, the severity of the infestation, and the number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and transparent quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as treatments address eggs and larvae that continue to hatch. We often recommend a follow-up treatment to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Longwood apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend that all people and pets vacate the premises for 2-4 hours during and immediately after treatment. You'll receive specific instructions based on the products used, but your safety is our top priority, and our treatments are pet-safe once dried.

faqs.question: Can fleas come back after professional treatment?
faqs.answer: While our treatments are highly effective, re-infestation can occur if fleas are reintroduced by pets, wildlife, or neighboring units in apartment buildings. We offer preventative maintenance plans and will work with you to identify and address potential sources of re-infestation to keep your Longwood home flea-free.
